ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jun-01-2026 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-19-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated is admitted to probate. Gregory Pearl is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 1, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Michael Kasolas is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Rene Auguste Chouteau. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Thompson. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-14-2025 Continued To May-19-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Roy Johnston, Esq., for Gregory Pearl, Petitioner.

At the court's query, counsel offers a report regarding the relationship of Debora Powell, Sandra Ross, and Jennifer Powell to the decedent and of the defective notice. After additional discussion, it does not appear that the relationships of the persons stated above has been clearly defined. The court advises counsel that it intends to continue this matter to allow him to provide clarification. Counsel is advised to reduce his findings to writing, file them with the court, and provide notice of the continued hearing date as required.

The subject matter is continued to May-19-2025 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-27-2025 Continued To Apr-14-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
